testcase.name: Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Successful login with OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Toggle password visibility
testcase.system-out: ✅ Password Toggled Successfully: Jahanzaib@123 ✅ Password Hidden Successfully

testcase.name: Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Login without accepting terms
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Invalid email format
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Incorrect password
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Retry login after failed attempt
testcase.system-out: ❌ Tried login with incorrect credentials: wrongemail@example.com / WrongPass123!

testcase.name: Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Verify OTP during login
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Login with invalid OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Forgot Password without entering OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Verify login placeholders
